$wpdb->query( "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {$table} (
`id` BIGINT(20) UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
`process_id` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
`user_name` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
`logger` VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
`log_order` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
`type` ENUM('log','info','warn','error') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'log',
`message` TEXT NOT NULL,
`file` VARCHAR(256) NOT NULL,
`line` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
`function` VARCHAR(256) NOT NULL,
`request_type` ENUM('call','ajax','cron') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'call',
`request_url` VARCHAR(1024) NOT NULL,
`created` DECIMAL(16, 6) NOT NULL,
PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
KEY `process_id` (`process_id` ASC),
KEY `process_logger` (`process_id` ASC, `logger` ASC),
KEY `function` (`function` ASC),
KEY `type` (`type` ASC))" )

preg_replace(
                    '/(\<a.+)(id="plugin_(install|update)_from_iframe")(.+href=")([^\s]+)(".*\>)(.+)(\<\/a>)/is',
                    is_object( $license ) ?
                        sprintf(
                            '$1$4%s$6%s$8',
                            $this->_fs->checkout_url(
                                is_object( $subscription ) ?
                                    ( 1 == $subscription->billing_cycle ? WP_FS__PERIOD_MONTHLY : WP_FS__PERIOD_ANNUALLY ) :
                                    WP_FS__PERIOD_LIFETIME,
                                false,
                                array( 'licenses' => $license->quota )

                            fs_text_inline( 'Renew license', 'renew-license', $this->_fs->get_slug() )
                        ) :
                        sprintf(
                            '$1$4%s$6%s$8',
                            $this->_fs->pricing_url(),
                            fs_text_inline( 'Buy license', 'buy-license', $this->_fs->get_slug() )
                        ),
                    $install_or_update_button
                )

preg_replace(
                        '/(\<div.+>)(.+)(\<a.+href="([^\s]+)"([^\<]+)\>.+\<a.+)(\<\/div\>)/is',

                                fs_text_inline( 'There is a %s of %s available.', 'new-version-available', $this->_fs->get_slug() ),

                            '$6'

preg_replace( '/(\)(.+)(\.+\)/is', ( '$1' . sprintf( fs_text_inline( 'There is a %s of %s available.', 'new-version-available', $this->_fs->get_slug() ), sprintf( '%s', '$5', $has_beta_update ? fs_text_inline( 'new Beta version', 'new-beta-version', $this->_fs->get_slug() ) : fs_text_inline( 'new version', 'new-version', $this->_fs->get_slug() ) ), $this->_fs->get_plugin_title() ) . $wpdb->prepare(
					"
					SELECT ID, post_title
					FROM $wpdb->posts
					WHERE
					(post_type = %s OR post_type = 'page')
					AND post_status = %s
					AND
					(ID = %d OR post_title LIKE %s)
					AND ID NOT IN ($exclude_ids_placeholder)
					ORDER BY 
					CASE WHEN ID = %d THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, ID DESC
					LIMIT %d;
					",
					array_merge(
						array( $post_type, 'publish', $search, '%' . $wpdb->esc_like( $search ) . '%' ),
						$exclude,
						array( (int) $search, 10 )
					)
				)

$wpdb->prepare(
					"
						SELECT ID, post_title
						FROM $wpdb->posts
						WHERE
						(post_type = %s OR post_type = 'page')
						AND post_status = %s
						AND
						(ID = %d OR post_title LIKE %s)
						ORDER BY 
						CASE WHEN ID = %d THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, ID DESC
						LIMIT %d;
						",
					$post_type,
					'publish',
					(int) $search,
					'%' . $wpdb->esc_like( $search ) . '%',
					(int) $search,
					10,
				)

$wpdb->prepare(
					"
						SELECT cat.term_id, cat.name
						FROM $wpdb->terms as cat
						INNER JOIN $wpdb->term_taxonomy as tax ON cat.term_id = tax.term_id
						WHERE tax.taxonomy = %s
						AND (cat.term_id = %d OR cat.name LIKE %s)
						AND cat.term_id NOT IN ($exclude_ids_placeholder)
						ORDER BY 
						CASE WHEN cat.term_id = %d THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, cat.term_id ASC
						LIMIT %d;
						",
					array_merge(
						array( $taxonomy, (int) $search, '%' . $wpdb->esc_like( $search ) . '%' ),
						$exclude,
						array( (int) $search, 10 ) // Prioritas ID dan batas jumlah hasil
					)
				)

wp_kses( __( '
  • Normal Load Image : Support retina, largest size at first load, good for SEO.
  • Lazy Load : Less number of image on first load, support for retina, best browsing experience, good for SEO.
  • Background : Support GIF image as featured thumbnail, bad for SEO.
', 'jeg-elementor-kit' ), wp_kses_allowed_html() )

wp_kses( __( '
  • Normal Image Generator : Fastest load time, but require more space. About 12 images will be generated for single image uploaded. If you switch to this option, please regenerate image again.
  • Dynamic Image Generator : Slower load time only when image created for the first time. Image generated only when needed.
', 'jeg-elementor-kit' ), wp_kses_allowed_html() )

wp_kses( __( '
  • Every element will behave differently when option changed depend on default meta on each element
', 'jeg-elementor-kit' ), wp_kses_allowed_html() )
